start_message:
👋 Welcome to the Text to Font Converter Bot!

📌 This bot helps you convert your text to beautiful fonts.

Please use the buttons below:
about_text:
🤖 *Text to Font Converter Bot*

📌 This bot allows you to convert your text to over 100 different fonts.

✨ *Features:*
• 🎨 Convert text to various fonts
• 🌍 Supports Persian and English
• ⚡ Fast and completely free

👨‍💻 *Developer:* @your_username
📢 *Channel:* @your_channel

💡 *How to use:*
1. Press 🎨 Font Generator button
2. Enter your text
3. Get the list of fonts

🔄 You can also use /start to start over.
font_prompt:
🎨 Please enter the text you want to convert to fonts:

📝 You can enter any text (Persian or English)
font_empty_error:
❌ Please enter a valid text.

🎨 Text cannot be empty.
font_more: 🎨 {count} more fonts available. Try again to see all.
font_error: ❌ Error generating fonts. Please try again.
unknown_command: ❌ Invalid command. Please use the menu buttons.
error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
maintenance: Bot is under maintenance. Please check back later.
blocked: ⚠️ You have been blocked for {duration} seconds due to spam.
not_admin: ⛔ You don't have access to this section.
